_comment: Editor-side property metadata for Blueprint-defined properties that exist on runtime BP subclasses but have NO C++ UPROPERTY anywhere in Source/, so the header scanner (Tools/Export/scan_property_meta.py) cannot see them. refresh-schema.mjs merges these into property-meta.json after the scan, so they survive refreshes and don't show as schema drift. Keys are Class.snake_property (bare class name, no U/F prefix). Entry shape matches the scanner's output.

ContainmentCageDefinition.screen_widget_.tooltip: Blueprint-defined: widget class shown for this cage's screen (overrides the default).

ScpGameData.default_lore_screen_widget_c.tooltip: Blueprint-defined: default widget class for lore/interaction screens.

ScpGameData.default_screen_widget_map.tooltip: Blueprint-defined: maps a definition class to its default screen widget class.

UniversalStorageDefinition.setup_widget_.tooltip: Blueprint-defined: widget class for the universal-storage setup screen.
